name: control mapping validator rejects a control entry missing the required legal_review_status field
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-control-mapping.sh" --controls controls.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'legal_review_status' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
setup:
printf '%b
' '- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]' > controls.yaml
